entry.title: MAD-HTLC
entry.summary: The research paper discussed by the programmer explores the dynamics between "weak" and "strong" miners within a mining network. The study particularly focuses on strategic behaviors exhibited by these miners, emphasizing that even a limited number of weak miners can employ a dominating strategy under certain conditions. This insight is pivotal in understanding power distribution and strategy optimization in mining activities, shedding light on how smaller players can still significantly influence the network despite their lesser capacity compared to stronger counterparts.
